question: This stacked bar chart shows the percentage market share of brands A, B, and C across different years. For Brand B, in which year is its market share highest?
explanation: The years along the x‑axis are presented in a scrambled order rather than true chronological order. If you reorder the columns by year and inspect only the segments for brand B, you will see that 2019 has the largest share. Simply picking the tallest segment based on the current left‑to‑right sequence can lead to choosing the wrong year.
